name: Curry Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 packages 10 oz. frozen broccoli - cooked and cut into halves
2 cans 10 oz. cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Use cooked chicken (or better yet cook some up fresh).
2. Place the cooked broccoli and chopped chicken in a large casserole dish.
3. Mix together the soup, mayonnaise, curry powder, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Top with cheese.
6. Toss bread crumbs with melted butter and sprinkle over the top.
7. Bake uncovered for 35 minutes at 325°F.
